tasks.name: Basic Endpoint Validation
tasks.description: Test all CRUD endpoints with valid inputs and verify correct status codes.

tasks.name: Edge Cases & Error Handling
tasks.description: Test boundary conditions, invalid inputs, and error responses.

tasks.name: Security & Multi-Step Workflows
tasks.description: Discover authorization flaws, injection vulnerabilities, and workflow bugs.

BUG_TASK_01.description: GET /tasks/{id} returns 200 with null for non-existent task
BUG_TASK_01.recommendation: Return 404 Not Found for non-existent resources

BUG_TASK_02.description: POST /tasks with missing title returns 500 instead of 400
BUG_TASK_02.recommendation: Validate required fields and return 400/422 with descriptive error

BUG_TASK_04.recommendation: Validate email format with regex before accepting

BUG_TASK_05.recommendation: Check resource existence before deletion, return 404 if missing

BUG_TASK_06.description: No pagination cap on limit parameter
BUG_TASK_06.recommendation: Cap pagination limit at 100, reject values above maximum

BUG_TASK_07.description: BOLA: any user can access any task
BUG_TASK_07.recommendation: Verify resource ownership: check task.owner_id matches authenticated user

BUG_TASK_08.recommendation: Add input length validation: title max 200 chars

BUG_TASK_09.recommendation: Sanitize user input before storage, escape HTML/SQL special characters

BUG_USER_01.recommendation: Validate email format server-side before creating user

BUG_USER_02.owasp: API3:2023 Broken Object Property Level Authorization
BUG_USER_02.recommendation: Never return sensitive fields (password_hash) in API responses

BUG_AUTH_01.recommendation: Enforce ownership check on all write operations (PUT/DELETE)

BUG_AUTH_02.recommendation: Validate password is non-empty and verify against stored hash
